sys_script_include.description:
2.7.2 | 2022-01-08 | RAJ | STRY0116680 - Reorganize code for getnextrundate to make the logic testable from api and automated script with no database read or write
Rolled back run 2 times fix 2.7.1 | 2021-12-21 | RAJ | DFCT0010422 - DIA: Schedules are running twice 2.7.1 | 2021-12-21 | RAJ | DFCT0010726 - "Draft" Monthly Scheduled Tasks shows the incorrect "Next Run Date" 2.7.101 | 2022-01-03 | RAJ | DFCT0010736 - Monthly Scheduled Tasks shows the incorrect "Next Run Date" (DAY OF THE WEEK as Monthly Type) 2.7.101 | 2022-01-04 | RAJ | DFCT0010742 - Daily and Weekly Schedule were skipping their start date
sys_script_include.name: TaskerSchedulerScript
